category.scope_note: Power tools comparison: China export to Kenya across KEBS PVoC, electrical safety, radio, workplace, and import entry obligations.

title.en: China-to-Kenya Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入肯尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入肯亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Kenya KEBS PVoC, mandatory Certificate of Conformity, Standardization Mark, KS IEC 62841 safety alignment, CA radio requirements for cordless modules, DOSHS workplace expectations, and import entry.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与肯尼亚KEBS PVoC、强制性符合性证书、标准化/进口标准化标志、与IEC对齐的KS IEC 62841、安全性、无绳工具无线电CA要求、DOSHS职业卫生要求和进口流程的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與肯亞KEBS PVoC、強制性符合性證明書、標準化/進口標準化標誌、與IEC對齊的KS IEC 62841、安全性、無繩工具無線電CA要求、DOSHS職業衛生要求和進口流程之差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs ruling, conformity-assessment determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Kenya legal, customs, KEBS, CA, and DOSHS requirements before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、符合性评定裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应核验现行肯尼亚法律、海关、KEBS、CA及DOSHS要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、符合性評定裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應核驗現行肯尼亞法律、海關、KEBS、CA及DOSHS要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made power tools entering Kenya, the mandatory baseline is KEBS PVoC import conformity for regulated models, a Certificate of Conformity, and the Standardization/Import Standardization Mark at clear-in process. Power-tool body safety is typically aligned to KS IEC 62841 as a Kenya-adopted technical basis. Cordless models with radio functionality need Communications Authority approvals in addition to electrical safety evidence. Kenya uses 240 V, 50 Hz, matching frequency but not nominal voltage profile from China (220/380 V), and no EU-style horizontal noise-marking, RoHS, or battery-regime mark is confirmed as a single mandatory product-level gate.
answer_first.zh: 对中国制造的电动工具进入肯尼亚，强制基线是受管制型号的KEBS进口符合性评估（PVoC）、符合性证书（CoC）与标准化/进口标准化标志的入境流程。电动工具本体安全通常以肯尼亚采纳并应用的IEC系列为基础的KS IEC 62841技术路径为主。带无线电功能的无绳工具还需通信管理局（CA）额外审批。肯尼亚为240 V、50 Hz，与中国同频但标称电压与中国220/380 V不同；并未确认存在与欧盟一致的户外噪声标志、RoHS或电池法规层面的统一强制性产品级门槛。
answer_first.zht: 對中國製造的電動工具進入肯尼亞，強制基線是受管制型號的KEBS進口符合性評估（PVoC）、符合性證明書（CoC）與標準化/進口標準化標誌之入境流程。電動工具本體安全通常以肯亞採納並應用之IEC系列的KS IEC 62841技術路徑為主。帶無線電功能的無繩工具仍需通訊管理局（CA）額外核准。肯亞為240 V、50 Hz，與中國同為50 Hz但額定電壓與中國220/380 V不同；且未確認存在與歐盟同等的戶外噪聲標誌、RoHS或電池法規層級的統一強制性產品門檻。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator, standards body, customs, radio authority, or primary legal source preferred.
